---
title: "Papermill HuggingFace Mount"
---

**[`papermill_hfmount.py`](papermill_hfmount.py)** is a
[Papermill](https://papermill.readthedocs.io/) I/O handler that lets notebooks be read
from and written to HuggingFace repositories using `hf://` URIs, via
[hf-mount](https://github.com/huggingface/hf-mount).

```python
import papermill as pm
import papermill_hfmount  # registers the handler

pm.execute_notebook(
    "hf://owner/repo/notebooks/analysis.ipynb",
    "hf://owner/repo/notebooks/analysis_out.ipynb",
)
```

Repos are mounted on first access under `~/.cache/papermill-hfmount/` and reused if
already mounted.
